source: scripts/agentic/design-reference-capture.ts --screen day-page (protocol captureScreenshot, hiDpi, target kind=main; sandboxHome:true, env SCRIPT_KIT_BRAIN_TZ=America/Denver, seeded day file, openDayPage hold-gesture helper)
motion: starfield phase is capture-time state (fx shader id 3)
backdrop: user's live desktop (NOT the synthetic fixture backdrop)
colorProfile: recorded-at-capture (heading/link amber drifts warm vs stock #FBBF24 — same non-blocking class as confirmCapture.stockThemeVsReferenceRaster)

fixture.command: seed ~/.scriptkit/brain/days/<today>.md (sandbox HOME) then openDayPage (main-hotkey HOLD gesture helper)
fixture.dayFileMarkdown:
# Friday · ship the Day Page mockup
09:12 sketched the Day Page fixture and token list
09:31 - [ ] wire day-page tokens into export_design_tokens #design
10:02 [Script Kit](https://scriptkit.com) landing refresh notes
09:47 [Clipboard entry](kit://clipboard-history?id=day-page-mockup-seed)
fixture.shelf: COLLAPSED (shipped rest state; clipboard_shelf_expanded initializes false) — '▸ Clipboard · 1 kept entry'; the kit:// line is lifted out of the editor into the shelf
fixture.expandedState: PENDING — no driver element-click primitive; expanded raster needs its own reference + receipt (geometry already locked: list 24, shelf 66, editor 350)
fixture.caret: trailing BLANK line (seeded file ends with a newline) — keeps the link destination deterministically in the REST state
fixture.contextZone: fixture-variable capture state (left '~/.scriptkit', model pill read 'Brain · GPT-5.6 SOL'); inert — no keycaps
fixture.activeFooter: native overlay owns a single Actions ⌘K on the plain Day Page (day_page_footer_buttons) — NOT part of this PNG; the GPUI band is the empty 32px rail

pixelReceipts.headingSameNominalSize: bold amber title inks from y≈56 in the 52–72 line box — same mono advance as body lines, weight+clip only (no larger font)
pixelReceipts.caretQuad: x≈31, y≈134.5–151 logical (2×17, centered in the blank fifth line's 132–152 box)
pixelReceipts.shelfToggleInk: toggle text ink y≈415–426 logical inside the modeled 416–436 toggle band (collapsed 38px accessory: 448−38=410 shelf top + 6 padding)
pixelReceipts.footerBandEdge: darker band starts at y=448 exactly — the 32px footer.railHeight edge, NOT the 36px modeled native host band (dayPageFooter.spacerVsNativeHostBand receipt)
pixelReceipts.collapsedBudget: day_page_layout_budget(480,32,32,1,false,12) = body 416 / editor 378 / shelf 38 / list 0 (locked in day_page::layout tests)
